group.name: Core Effects
group.description: Reusable core effects composed from set-color primitives

effects.name: Flash Colour
effects.description: Flashes a colour on target lights with configurable fade-in, hold, and fade-out.

effects.name: Sweep Colour
effects.description: Sweeps a colour across target lights with staggered delays.

variables.name: lowBrightness
variables.description: Brightness level to fade out to (same colour as sweep)

effects.name: Rotation Clockwise
effects.description: Rotates a colour clockwise across target lights, beat-synchronised. Uses 3 chained set-color transitions per light.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Event type to count per phase (beat, keyframe)

variables.name: waitUntilConditionCount
variables.description: Additional condition count offset applied to all phases

variables.name: waitUntilTime
variables.description: Ms to wait per phase when waitUntilCondition is delay

variables.name: groupSize
variables.description: Iterate in groups of this many lights (e.g. 2 for opposite pairs)

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
For each normally increments by 1.
Group Size lets us increment by X, while also reducing
the number of iterations / X.

E.g. groupSize 2 means for each step we iterate two
lights instead of one, and halve the total number
of iterations. 

This is used by cues like Score to move groups of two
defined lights in a clockwise pattern.
notes.title: For Each Light & Group Size

effects.name: Rotation Counter-Clockwise
effects.description: Rotates a colour counter-clockwise across target lights, beat-synchronised. Uses 3 chained set-color transitions per light.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Event type to count per phase (beat, keyframe)

variables.name: waitUntilConditionCount
variables.description: Additional condition count offset applied to all phases

variables.name: waitUntilTime
variables.description: Ms to wait per phase when waitUntilCondition is delay

variables.name: groupSize
variables.description: Iterate in groups of this many lights (e.g. 2 for opposite pairs)

effects.name: Dual-Mode Rotation
effects.description: Counter-clockwise rotation that adds a solid-colour hold after all lights have cycled. 3 chained set-color phases per light, then 2 solid-mode transitions on all lights.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Beat-like condition to count per rotation phase

variables.name: waitUntilConditionCount
variables.description: Additional condition count offset applied to all rotation phases

variables.name: dualModeSolidColor
variables.description: Solid colour during the hold phase

variables.name: dualModeSwitchCondition
variables.description: Condition to hold each solid-mode phase

effects.name: Alternating Pattern
effects.description: Alternates a colour between two light groups in sequence. 5 chained set-color transitions: patternA active, patternA off, patternB off, patternB active, patternB off.

effects.name: Rotation CCW (2 beats)
effects.description: Counter-clockwise rotation with 2 beats per cycle. 3 chained set-color transitions per light.

variables.name: waitUntilCondition
variables.description: Event type to count per phase

effects.name: Cross-Fade Colours
effects.description: Alternates between two colours on target lights, advancing on each trigger event.

variables.name: crossFadeTrigger
variables.description: Event that advances to the next colour (measure / keyframe / beat)
